description:
Advanced source code and text file printing.

WinPrint is a modern source code and text printing app with a cross-platform terminal UI and Windows/macOS GUI.
What's Changed
- Merge main back into develop after v3.1.0 by @tig in #237
- feat(markdown): render mermaid fences in-process by default via Mermaider (#238) by @tig in #239
